title: Part Feeding Wizard Flip
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Flip

Flip

This screen is used to configure whether the part needs to be flipped or not.  If a part needs to be picked up from a particular side, then "Part needs to be flipped" should be checked.

Item	Description

Part needs to be flipped	Select this check box for parts that require the front and back sides to be orientated properly.

This enables a flip action used to change orientation at pick up.  This may increase the number of parts that can be retrieved in a single feeder motion, improving cycle times.
